query: Why does this workflow fail? The LLM node references {{#start_node.query#}} but nothing happens

query: My chatflow uses an end node but it doesn't stream the response
expected_behavior: Explains that advanced-chat mode requires answer node, not end

query: Import fails with 'orphan node detected' error
